1	#pragma once
2	/**
3	 * @file
4	 * @author  Alex Singer
5	 * @date    September 2024
6	 * @brief   The declaration of the Cluster Legalizer class.
7	 *
8	 * This file declares a class called the ClusterLegalizer which encapsulates all
9	 * logic for creating legal clusters from prepacked molecules. This class is
10	 * designed to be self-contained to the point that it is able to be called
11	 * externally to the Packer in VPR.
12	 */
13	
14	#include <optional>
15	#include <string>
16	#include <vector>
17	#include "atom_netlist_fwd.h"
18	#include "cluster_legalizer_fwd.h"
19	#include "cluster_router.h"
20	#include "noc_data_types.h"
21	#include "partition_region.h"
22	#include "prepack.h"
23	#include "vpr_types.h"
24	#include "vtr_range.h"
25	#include "vtr_strong_id.h"
26	#include "vtr_vector.h"
27	#include "vtr_vector_map.h"
28	#include "atom_pb_bimap.h"
29	#include "vpr_utils.h"
30	#include "packing_signature_tree.h"
31	
32	// Forward declarations
33	class Prepacker;
34	class LogicalModels;
35	class t_intra_cluster_placement_stats;
36	class t_pb_graph_node;
37	
38	/**
39	 * @brief Holds information to be shared between molecules that represent the
40	 *        same chained pack pattern, specifically for packing.
41	 *
42	 * For example, molecules that are representing a long carry chain that spans
43	 * multiple logic blocks.
44	 *
45	 * This is holding clustering-specific information on the chains. General
46	 * information on chains is found in the t_chain_info type.
47	 */
48	struct t_clustering_chain_info {
49	    /// @brief An ID into the chain_root_pins vector in the t_pack_patterns of
50	    ///        the molecule.
51	    ///
52	    /// Used to get the starting point of this chain in the cluster. This ID is
53	    /// useful when we have multiple (architectural) carry chains in a logic
54	    /// block, for example. It lets us see which of the chains is being used for
55	    /// this long (netlist) chain, so we continue to use that chain in the
56	    /// packing of other molecules of this long chain.
57	    int chain_id = -1;
58	
59	    /// @brief First molecule to be packed out of the molecules forming this
60	    ///        chain. This is the molecule setting the value of the chain_id.
61	    PackMoleculeId first_packed_molecule;
62	};
63	
64	/// @brief The different legalization strategies the cluster legalizer can perform.
65	///
66	/// Allows the user of the API to select how thorough the legalizer should be
67	/// when adding molecules into clusters.
68	enum class ClusterLegalizationStrategy {
69	    FULL,               // Run the full legalizer (including intra-lb routing)
70	    SKIP_INTRA_LB_ROUTE // Do all legality checks except intra-lb routing
71	};
72	
73	/// @brief The status of the cluster legalization.
74	enum class e_block_pack_status {
75	    BLK_PASSED,               // Passed legalization.
76	    BLK_FAILED_FEASIBLE,      // Failed due to block not feasibly being able to go in the cluster.
77	    BLK_FAILED_ROUTE,         // Failed due to intra-lb routing failure.
78	    BLK_FAILED_FLOORPLANNING, // Failed due to not being compatible with the cluster's current PartitionRegion.
79	    BLK_FAILED_NOC_GROUP,     // Failed due to not being compatible with the cluster's NoC group.
80	    BLK_STATUS_UNDEFINED      // Undefined status. Something went wrong.
81	};
82	
83	/*
84	 * @brief A struct containing information about the cluster.
85	 *
86	 * This contains necessary information for legalizing a cluster.
87	 */
88	struct LegalizationCluster {
89	    /**
90	     * @brief Default constructor for the LegalizationCluster class.
91	     *
92	     * This is needed to use this class within the vtr::vector_map class.
93	     */
94	    LegalizationCluster()
95	        : pb(nullptr)
96	        , type(nullptr)
97	        , pr(PartitionRegion())
98	        , noc_grp_id(NocGroupId::INVALID())
99	        , cluster_router()
100	        , placement_stats(nullptr) {}
101	
102	    /**
103	     * @brief Constructor for the LegalizationCluster class.
104	     *
105	     *  @param cluster_type              The type of this cluster.
106	     *  @param cluster_mode              The mode of this cluster.
107	     *  @param lb_type_rr_graphs         The RR-graphs for each cluster type.
108	     *  @param valid_feedback_pins       Pre-computed feedback-pin set for this type;
109	     *                                   owned by ClusterLegalizer, must outlive this cluster.
110	     *  @param enable_router_hot_start   Forwarded to ClusterRouter; enables hot-start
111	     *                                   routing on each try_intra_lb_route call.
112	     */
113	    LegalizationCluster(t_logical_block_type_ptr cluster_type,
114	                        int cluster_mode,
115	                        std::vector<t_lb_type_rr_node>* lb_type_rr_graphs,
116	                        const std::unordered_set<int>& valid_feedback_pins,
117	                        bool enable_router_hot_start = false);
118	
119	    /// @brief A list of the molecules in the cluster. By design, a cluster will
120	    ///        only contain molecules which have been previously legalized into
121	    ///        the cluster using a legalization strategy.
122	    std::vector<PackMoleculeId> molecules;
123	
124	    /// @brief The logical block of this cluster.
125	    /// TODO: We should be more careful with how this is allocated. Instead of
126	    ///       pointers, we really should use IDs and store them in a standard
127	    ///       container. Currently this is being allocated with the new keyword
128	    ///       and freed when the cluster is destroyed; however this is used
129	    ///       externally to the class and it can be dangerous to pass around
130	    ///       a pointer to this object.
131	    t_pb* pb;
132	
133	    /// @brief The logical block type this cluster represents.
134	    t_logical_block_type_ptr type;
135	
136	    /// @brief The partition region of legal positions this cluster can be placed.
137	    ///        Used to detect if a molecule can physically be placed in a cluster.
138	    ///        It is derived from the partition region constraints on the atoms
139	    ///        in the cluster (not fundamental but good for performance).
140	    PartitionRegion pr;
141	
142	    /// @brief The NoC group that this cluster is a part of. Is used to check if
143	    ///        a candidate primitive is in the same NoC group as the atom blocks
144	    ///        that have already been added to the primitive. This can be helpful
145	    ///        for optimization.
146	    NocGroupId noc_grp_id;
147	
148	    /// @brief The intra lb router used for this cluster.
149	    ///        Contains information about the atoms in the cluster and how they
150	    ///        can be routed within.
151	    ClusterRouter cluster_router;
152	
153	    /// @brief The stats on where the different atoms in the cluster are currently
154	    ///        placed in the cluster. This is used when the legalizer decides
155	    ///        what sites it should try to put a new molecule into.
156	    t_intra_cluster_placement_stats* placement_stats;
157	};
158	
159	/*
160	 * @brief A manager class which manages the legalization of clusters. As clusters
161	 *        are created, this class will legalize for each molecule added. It also
162	 *        provides methods which are helpful for clustering.
163	 *
164	 * Usage:
165	 * The ClusterLegalizer class maintains the clusters within itself since the
166	 * legalization of a cluster depends on the molecules which have already been
167	 * inserted into the clusters prior.
168	 *
169	 * The class provides different legalization strategies the user may use to
170	 * legalize:
171	 *  1) SKIP_INTRA_LB_ROUTE
172	 *  2) FULL
173	 *
174	 * 1) SKIP_INTRA_LB_ROUTE Legalization Strategy Example:
175	 * This strategy will not fully route the internal connections of the clusters
176	 * until when the user specifies. An example of how to use this strategy would
177	 * look something like this. Note, this example is simplified and the result
178	 * of the packings should be checked and handled.
179	 *
180	 * ClusterLegalizer legalizer(...,
181	 *                            ClusterLegalizationStrategy::SKIP_INTRA_LB_ROUTE,
182	 *                            ...);
183	 *
184	 * std::tie(status, new_cluster_id) = legalizer.start_new_cluster(seed_mol,
185	 *                                                                cluster_type,
186	 *                                                                mode);
187	 * for mol in molecules_to_add:
188	 *      // Cheaper additions, but may pack a molecule that wouldn't route.
189	 *      status = legalizer.add_mol_to_cluster(mol, new_cluster_id);
190	 *      if (status != e_block_pack_status::BLK_PASSED)
191	 *          break;
192	 *
193	 * // Do the expensive check once all molecules are in.
194	 * if (!legalizer.check_cluster_legality(new_cluster_id))
195	 *      // Destroy the illegal cluster.
196	 *      legalizer.destroy_cluster(new_cluster_id);
197	 *      // Clean-up the internal bookkeeping of the class (required after
198	 *      // destroying a cluster).
199	 *      legalizer.compress();
200	 *      // Handle how to try again (maybe use FULL strategy).
201	 *
202	 * 2) FULL Legalization Strategy Example:
203	 * This strategy will fully route the internal connections of the clusters for
204	 * each molecule added. This is much more expensive to run; however, will ensure
205	 * that the cluster is fully legalized while it is being created. An example
206	 * of how to use this strategy would look something like this:
207	 *
208	 * Clusterlegalizer legalizer(...,
209	 *                            ClusterLegalizationStrategy::FULL,
210	 *                            ...);
211	 *
212	 * std::tie(pack_result, new_cluster_id) = legalizer.start_new_cluster(seed_mol,
213	 *                                                                     cluster_type,
214	 *                                                                     mode);
215	 * for mol in molecules_to_add:
216	 *      // Do the expensive check for each molecule added.
217	 *      status = legalizer.add_mol_to_cluster(mol, new_cluster_id);
218	 *      if (status != e_block_pack_status::BLK_PASSED)
219	 *          break;
220	 *
221	 * // new_cluster_id now contains a fully legalized cluster.
222	 */
223	class ClusterLegalizer {
224	  public:
225	    // Iterator for the legalization cluster IDs
226	    typedef typename vtr::vector_map<LegalizationClusterId, LegalizationClusterId>::const_iterator cluster_iterator;
227	
228	    // Range for the legalization cluster IDs
229	    typedef typename vtr::Range<cluster_iterator> cluster_range;
230	
231	  private:
232	    /*
233	     * @brief Helper method that tries to pack the given molecule into a cluster.
234	     *
235	     * This method runs all the legality checks specified by the legalization
236	     * strategy. If the molecule can be packed into the cluster, it will insert
237	     * it into the cluster.
238	     *
239	     *  @param molecule                 The molecule to insert into the cluster.
240	     *  @param cluster                  The cluster to try to insert the molecule into.
241	     *  @param cluster_id               The ID of the cluster.
242	     *  @param max_external_pin_util    The max external pin utilization for a
243	     *                                  cluster of this type.
244	     */
245	    e_block_pack_status try_pack_molecule(PackMoleculeId molecule_id,
246	                                          LegalizationCluster& cluster,
247	                                          LegalizationClusterId cluster_id,
248	                                          const t_ext_pin_util& max_external_pin_util);
249	
250	    /**
251	     * @brief This function takes a chain molecule, and the pb_graph_node that is
252	     *        chosen for packing the molecule's root block. Using the given
253	     *        root_primitive, this function will identify which chain id this
254	     *        molecule is being mapped to and will update the chain id value inside
255	     *        the chain info data structure of this molecule.
256	     */
257	    void update_clustering_chain_info(PackMoleculeId chain_molecule_id,
258	                                      const t_pb_graph_node* root_primitive);
259	
260	    /*
261	     * @brief Reset molecule information created while trying to cluster it.
262	     *
263	     * This code only resets information that has to do with long chains.
264	     */
265	    void reset_molecule_info(PackMoleculeId mol_id);
266	
267	  public:
268	    // Explicitly deleted default constructor. Need to use other constructor to
269	    // initialize state correctly.
270	    ClusterLegalizer() = delete;
271	
272	    /*
273	     * @brief Initialize the ClusterLegalizer class.
274	     *
275	     * Allocates internal state.
276	     *
277	     *  @param atom_netlist
278	     *          The complete atom netlist. Used to allocate internal structures
279	     *          to the correct size.
280	     *  @param prepacker
281	     *          The prepacker object used to prepack the atoms into molecules.
282	     *          A reference to this object is stored internally to be used to
283	     *          lookup the molecules of atoms.
284	     *  @param lb_type_rr_graphs
285	     *          The routing resource graph internal to the different cluster
286	     *          types. A reference is stored in the class to be used to allocate
287	     *          and load the router data.
288	     *  @param target_external_pin_util_str
289	     *          A string used to initialize the target external pin utilization
290	     *          of each cluster type.
291	     *  @param high_fanout_thresholds
292	     *          An object that stores the thresholds for a net to be considered
293	     *          high fanout for different block types.
294	     *  @param cluster_legalization_strategy
295	     *          The legalization strategy to be used when creating clusters and
296	     *          adding molecules to clusters. Controls the checks that are
297	     *          performed.
298	     *  @param enable_pin_feasibility_filter
299	     *          A flag to turn on/off the check for pin usage feasibility.
300	     *  @param memoize_cluster_packings
301	     *          A flag to turn on/off the cluster memoization runtime optimization.
302	     *  @param enable_cluster_router_hot_start
303	     *          When true, each call to try_intra_lb_route seeds unchanged nets
304	     *          from the last successful route before running pathfinder.
305	     *  @param models
306	     *  @param log_verbosity
307	     *          Controls how verbose the log messages will be within this class.
308	     */
309	    ClusterLegalizer(const AtomNetlist& atom_netlist,
310	                     const Prepacker& prepacker,
311	                     std::vector<t_lb_type_rr_node>* lb_type_rr_graphs,
312	                     const std::vector<std::string>& target_external_pin_util_str,
313	                     const t_pack_high_fanout_thresholds& high_fanout_thresholds,
314	                     ClusterLegalizationStrategy cluster_legalization_strategy,
315	                     bool enable_pin_feasibility_filter,
316	                     bool memoize_cluster_packings,
317	                     bool enable_cluster_router_hot_start,
318	                     const LogicalModels& models,
319	                     int log_verbosity);
320	
321	    // This class allocates and deallocates memory within. This class should not
322	    // be copied or moved to prevent it from double freeing / losing pointers.
323	    ClusterLegalizer(const ClusterLegalizer&) = delete;
324	    ClusterLegalizer& operator=(const ClusterLegalizer&) = delete;
325	
326	    /*
327	     * @brief Start a new legalization cluster with the given molecule.
328	     *
329	     *  @param molecule         The seed molecule used to start the new cluster.
330	     *  @param cluster_type     The type of the cluster to start.
331	     *  @param cluster_mode     The mode of the new cluster for the given type.
332	     *
333	     *  @return     A pair for the status of the packing and the ID of the new
334	     *              cluster. If the new cluster could not be created, the pack
335	     *              status will return the reason and the ID would be invalid.
336	     */
337	    std::tuple<e_block_pack_status, LegalizationClusterId>
338	    start_new_cluster(PackMoleculeId molecule_id,
339	                      t_logical_block_type_ptr cluster_type,
340	                      int cluster_mode);
341	
342	    /*
343	     * @brief Add an unclustered molecule to the given legalization cluster.
344	     *
345	     * The ClusterLegalizationStrategy (set either in the constructor or by the
346	     * set_cluster_legalization_strategy method) decides what checks are
347	     * performed when adding a molecule to the cluster.
348	     *
349	     * If the addition was unsuccessful (i.e. a check fails), the molecule will
350	     * remain unclustered.
351	     *
352	     *  @param molecule         The molecule to add to the cluster.
353	     *  @param cluster_id       The ID of the cluster to add the molecule to.
354	     *
355	     *  @return     The status of the pack (if the addition was successful and
356	     *              if not why).
357	     */
358	    e_block_pack_status add_mol_to_cluster(PackMoleculeId molecule_id,
359	                                           LegalizationClusterId cluster_id);
360	
361	    /*
362	     * @brief Destroy the given cluster.
363	     *
364	     * This unclusters all molecules in the cluster so they can be re-clustered
365	     * into different clusters. Should call the compress() method after destroying
366	     * one or more clusters.
367	     *
368	     *  @param cluster_id       The ID of the cluster to destroy.
369	     */
370	    void destroy_cluster(LegalizationClusterId cluster_id);
371	
372	    /*
373	     * @brief Compress the internal storage of clusters. Should be called
374	     *        eventually after one or more clusters are destroyed.
375	     *
376	     * Similar to the Netlist compress method. Will invalidate all Legalization
377	     * Cluster IDs.
378	     *
379	     * This method can be quite expensive, so it is a good idea to batch many
380	     * cluster destructions and then compress at the end.
381	     */
382	    void compress();
383	
384	    /*
385	     * @brief A range of all cluster IDs in the legalizer.
386	     *
387	     * If the legalizer has been compressed (or no clusters have been destroyed)
388	     * then all cluster IDs in this list will be valid and represent a non-empty
389	     * legalization cluster.
390	     */
391	    cluster_range clusters() const {
392	        return vtr::make_range(legalization_cluster_ids_.begin(), legalization_cluster_ids_.end());
393	    }
394	
395	    /*
396	     * @brief Check that the given cluster is fully legal.
397	     *
398	     * This method runs an intra_lb_route on the given cluster. This ignores
399	     * the cluster legalization strategy set by the user. This method will not
400	     * correct the problematic molecules, it will only return true if the
401	     * cluster is legal and false if it is not.
402	     *
403	     *  @param cluster_id       The ID of the cluster to fully legalize.
404	     *
405	     *  @return                 True if the cluster is legal, false otherwise.
406	     */
407	    bool check_cluster_legality(LegalizationClusterId cluster_id);
408	
409	    /*
410	     * @brief Ensure that the cluster has a legal final routing.
411	     *
412	     * Checks that the cluster is routable. If it is routable, ensures that
413	     * an up-to-date routing has been created and stored in the appropriate
414	     * clustering data structures, creating one if not.
415	     *
416	     * For SKIP_INTRA_LB_ROUTE packing, this is the first time routing
417	     * is run on the cluster and may fail. For detailed routing with the
418	     * the PackingSignatureTree enabled, this function makes sure the cluster
419	     * has a routing to pass to later stages since routing steps may have been
420	     * skipped for cluster patterns where the legality was known from packing
421	     * a previous cluster.
422	     *
423	     *  @param cluster_id       The ID of the cluster to ensure has a legal routing.
424	     *
425	     *  @return                 True if the cluster is routed and legal, false otherwise.
426	     * */
427	    bool ensure_legal_final_routing(LegalizationClusterId cluster_id);
428	
429	    /*
430	     * @brief Cleans the cluster of unnecessary data, reducing the memory footprint.
431	     *
432	     * After this function is called, no more molecules can be added to the
433	     * cluster. This method will ensure that the cluster has enough information
434	     * to generate a clustered netlist from the legalized clusters.
435	     *
436	     * Specifically, this frees the pb stats (which is used by the clusterer
437	     * to compute the gain) and the router data of the cluster.
438	     *
439	     * TODO: The pb stats should really not be calculated or stored in the
440	     *       cluster legalizer.
441	     *
442	     *  @param cluster_id   The ID of the cluster to clean.
443	     */
444	    void clean_cluster(LegalizationClusterId cluster_id);
445	
446	    /*
447	     * @brief Verify that all atoms have been clustered into some cluster.
448	     *
449	     * This will not verify if all the clusters are fully legal.
450	     */
451	    void verify();
452	
453	    /*
454	     * @brief Finalize the clustering. Required for generating a Clustered
455	     *        Netlist.
456	     *
457	     * Before generating a Clustered Netlist, each cluster needs to allocate and
458	     * load a pb_route. This method will generate a pb_route for each cluster
459	     * and store it into the clusters' pb.
460	     */
461	    void finalize();
462	
463	    /*
464	     * @brief Resets the legalizer to its initial state.
465	     *
466	     * Destroys all clusters and resets the cluster placement stats.
467	     */
468	    void reset();
469	
470	    /*
471	     * @brief Checks if the given molecule is compatible with the given cluster.
472	     *
473	     * A molecule is compatible with a cluster if there exists a free primitive
474	     * (a primitive that is not currently occupied by other atoms) of the correct
475	     * type to accommodate each type of atom in the molecule.
476	     *
477	     * This is a quick check to see if a molecule can go in the given cluster.
478	     * "This is a necessary but not sufficient test for a molecule to be able to
479	     * go in a cluster. By calling it you can save runtime for impossible cases
480	     * vs. calling the full checks.
481	     */
482	    bool is_molecule_compatible(PackMoleculeId molecule_id,
483	                                LegalizationClusterId cluster_id) const;
484	
485	    /// @brief Gets the top-level pb of the given cluster.
486	    inline t_pb* get_cluster_pb(LegalizationClusterId cluster_id) const {
487	        VTR_ASSERT_SAFE(cluster_id.is_valid() && (size_t)cluster_id < legalization_clusters_.size());
488	        const LegalizationCluster& cluster = legalization_clusters_[cluster_id];
489	        return cluster.pb;
490	    }
491	
492	    /// @brief Gets the name of the given cluster.
493	    inline std::string get_cluster_name(LegalizationClusterId cluster_id) const {
494	        VTR_ASSERT_SAFE(cluster_id.is_valid() && (size_t)cluster_id < legalization_clusters_.size());
495	        const LegalizationCluster& cluster = legalization_clusters_[cluster_id];
496	        return cluster.pb->name;
497	    }
498	
499	    /// @brief Gets the logical block type of the given cluster.
500	    inline t_logical_block_type_ptr get_cluster_type(LegalizationClusterId cluster_id) const {
501	        VTR_ASSERT_SAFE(cluster_id.is_valid() && (size_t)cluster_id < legalization_clusters_.size());
502	        const LegalizationCluster& cluster = legalization_clusters_[cluster_id];
503	        return cluster.type;
504	    }
505	
506	    /// @brief Gets the current partition region (the intersection of all
507	    ///        contained atoms) of the given cluster.
508	    inline const PartitionRegion& get_cluster_pr(LegalizationClusterId cluster_id) const {
509	        VTR_ASSERT_SAFE(cluster_id.is_valid() && (size_t)cluster_id < legalization_clusters_.size());
510	        const LegalizationCluster& cluster = legalization_clusters_[cluster_id];
511	        return cluster.pr;
512	    }
513	
514	    /// @brief Gets the molecules currently packed within the given cluster.
515	    inline const std::vector<PackMoleculeId>& get_cluster_molecules(LegalizationClusterId cluster_id) const {
516	        VTR_ASSERT_SAFE(cluster_id.is_valid() && (size_t)cluster_id < legalization_clusters_.size());
517	        const LegalizationCluster& cluster = legalization_clusters_[cluster_id];
518	        return cluster.molecules;
519	    }
520	
521	    /// @brief Gets the current number of molecules in the cluster.
522	    inline size_t get_num_molecules_in_cluster(LegalizationClusterId cluster_id) const {
523	        VTR_ASSERT_SAFE(cluster_id.is_valid() && (size_t)cluster_id < legalization_clusters_.size());
524	        const LegalizationCluster& cluster = legalization_clusters_[cluster_id];
525	        return cluster.molecules.size();
526	    }
527	
528	    /// @brief Gets the total number of cluster inputs available.
529	    size_t get_num_cluster_inputs_available(LegalizationClusterId cluster_id) const;
530	
531	    /// @brief Gets the ID of the cluster that contains the given atom block.
532	    inline LegalizationClusterId get_atom_cluster(AtomBlockId blk_id) const {
533	        VTR_ASSERT_SAFE(blk_id.is_valid() && (size_t)blk_id < atom_cluster_.size());
534	        return atom_cluster_[blk_id];
535	    }
536	
537	    /// @brief Returns true if the given atom block has been packed into a
538	    ///        cluster, false otherwise.
539	    inline bool is_atom_clustered(AtomBlockId blk_id) const {
540	        // Simply, if the atom is not in an invalid cluster, it has been clustered.
541	        return get_atom_cluster(blk_id) != LegalizationClusterId::INVALID();
542	    }
543	
544	    /// @brief Returns true if the given molecule has been packed into a
545	    ///        cluster, false otherwise.
546	    inline bool is_mol_clustered(PackMoleculeId mol_id) const {
547	        VTR_ASSERT_SAFE(mol_id.is_valid());
548	        // Check if the molecule has been assigned a cluster. It has not been
549	        // assigned a cluster if it is assigned to a valid cluster.
550	        return molecule_cluster_[mol_id].is_valid();
551	    }
552	
553	    /// @brief Returns a reference to the target_external_pin_util object. This
554	    ///        allows the user to modify the external pin utilization if needed.
555	    inline t_ext_pin_util_targets& get_target_external_pin_util() {
556	        return target_external_pin_util_;
557	    }
558	
559	    /*
560	     * @brief Set the legalization strategy of the cluster legalizer.
561	     *
562	     * This allows the strategy of the cluster legalizer to change based on the
563	     * needs of the user. For example, one can set the legalizer to use a more
564	     * relaxed strategy to insert a batch of molecules in cheaply, saving the
565	     * full legalizerion for the end (using check_cluster_legality).
566	     *
567	     *  @param strategy     The strategy to set the cluster legalizer to.
568	     */
569	    inline void set_legalization_strategy(ClusterLegalizationStrategy strategy) {
570	        cluster_legalization_strategy_ = strategy;
571	    }
572	
573	    /*
574	     * @brief Set how verbose the log messages should be for the cluster legalizer.
575	     *
576	     * This allows the user to set the verbosity at different points for easier
577	     * usability.
578	     *
579	     * Set the verbosity to 4 to see most of the log messages on how the
580	     * molecules move through the legalizer.
581	     * Set the verbosity to 5 to see all the log messages in the legalizer.
582	     *
583	     *  @param verbosity    The value to set the verbosity to.
584	     */
585	    inline void set_log_verbosity(int verbosity) {
586	        log_verbosity_ = verbosity;
587	    }
588	
589	    inline const AtomPBBimap& atom_pb_lookup() const { return atom_pb_lookup_; }
590	    inline AtomPBBimap& mutable_atom_pb_lookup() { return atom_pb_lookup_; }
591	
592	    inline const IntraLbPbPinLookup& intra_lb_pb_pin_lookup() const { return intra_lb_pb_pin_lookup_; }
593	
594	    /// @brief Destructor of the class. Frees allocated data.
595	    ~ClusterLegalizer();
596	
597	  private:
598	    /// @brief Build the per-type feedback-pin sets used by the intra-cluster router.
599	    ///        Called once by the constructor.
600	    void init_feedback_pin_sets();
601	
602	    /// @brief A vector of the legalization cluster IDs. If any of them are
603	    ///        invalid, then that means that the cluster has been destroyed.
604	    vtr::vector_map<LegalizationClusterId, LegalizationClusterId> legalization_cluster_ids_;
605	
606	    /// @brief Lookup table for which cluster each molecule is in.
607	    vtr::vector_map<PackMoleculeId, LegalizationClusterId> molecule_cluster_;
608	
609	    /// @brief Clustering chain information for each of the chains in the prepacker.
610	    vtr::vector_map<MoleculeChainId, t_clustering_chain_info> clustering_chain_info_;
611	
612	    /// @brief List of all legalization clusters.
613	    vtr::vector_map<LegalizationClusterId, LegalizationCluster> legalization_clusters_;
614	
615	    /// @brief A lookup-table for which cluster the given atom is packed into.
616	    vtr::vector_map<AtomBlockId, LegalizationClusterId> atom_cluster_;
617	
618	    /// @brief Stores the NoC group ID of each atom block. Atom blocks that
619	    ///        belong to different NoC groups can't be clustered with each other
620	    ///        into the same clustered block. Under some optimization settings
621	    ///        to improve placement locality / NoC usage. Atoms with different
622	    ///        NoC group IDs belong to logic that is disjoint except through
623	    ///        NoC traffic.
624	    vtr::vector<AtomBlockId, NocGroupId> atom_noc_grp_id_;
625	
626	    /// @brief The maximum fractional utilization of cluster external
627	    ///        input/output pins during packing (between 0 and 1).
628	    t_ext_pin_util_targets target_external_pin_util_;
629	
630	    /// @brief The max size of any molecule. This is used to allocate a dynamic
631	    ///        array within the legalizer, and in its current form this is a bit
632	    ///        expensive to calculate from the prepacker.
633	    size_t max_molecule_size_;
634	
635	    /// @brief A vector of routing resource nodes within each logical block type
636	    ///        [0 .. num_logical_block_types-1]
637	    /// TODO: This really should not be a pointer to a vector... I think this is
638	    ///       meant to be a vector of vectors...
639	    std::vector<t_lb_type_rr_node>* lb_type_rr_graphs_ = nullptr;
640	
641	    /// @brief Per-type set of top-level output pin indices with Fc_out > 0.
642	    ///        Indexed by t_logical_block_type::index.
643	    std::vector<std::unordered_set<int>> valid_feedback_pins_by_type_;
644	
645	    /// @brief The current legalization strategy of the cluster legalizer.
646	    ClusterLegalizationStrategy cluster_legalization_strategy_;
647	
648	    /// @brief Controls whether the pin counting feasibility filter is used
649	    ///        during clustering. When enabled the clustering engine counts the
650	    ///        number of available pins in groups/classes of mutually connected
651	    ///        pins within a cluster. These counts are used to quickly filter
652	    ///        out candidate primitives/atoms/molecules for which the cluster
653	    ///        has insufficient pins to route (without performing a full
654	    ///        routing). This reduces packing run-time. This matches the packer
655	    ///        option of the same name.
656	    bool enable_pin_feasibility_filter_;

661	    bool enable_cluster_router_hot_start_;

665	    ///        messages when a molecule is successful during legalization. When

161	
162	    print_pack_status_header();
163	
164	    // Continue clustering as long as a valid seed is returned from the seed
165	    // selector.
166	    while (seed_mol_id.is_valid()) {
167	        // Check to ensure that this molecule is unclustered.
168	        VTR_ASSERT(!cluster_legalizer.is_mol_clustered(seed_mol_id));
169	
170	        // The basic algorithm:
171	        // 1) Try to put all the molecules in that you can without doing the
172	        //    full intra-lb route. Then do full legalization at the end.
173	        // 2) If the legalization at the end fails, try again, but this time
174	        //    do full legalization for each molecule added to the cluster.
175	
176	        // Try to grow a cluster from the seed molecule without doing intra-lb
177	        // route for each molecule (i.e. just use faster but not fully
178	        // conservative legality checks).
179	        LegalizationClusterId new_cluster_id = try_grow_cluster(seed_mol_id,
180	                                                                candidate_selector,
181	                                                                ClusterLegalizationStrategy::SKIP_INTRA_LB_ROUTE,
182	                                                                cluster_legalizer,
183	                                                                prepacker,
184	                                                                ram_mapper,
185	                                                                balance_block_type_utilization,
186	                                                                attraction_groups,
187	                                                                num_used_type_instances,
188	                                                                mutable_device_ctx);
189	
190	        if (!new_cluster_id.is_valid()) {
191	            // If the previous strategy failed, try to grow the cluster again,
192	            // but this time perform full legalization for each molecule added
193	            // to the cluster.
194	            new_cluster_id = try_grow_cluster(seed_mol_id,
195	                                              candidate_selector,
196	                                              ClusterLegalizationStrategy::FULL,
197	                                              cluster_legalizer,
198	                                              prepacker,
199	                                              ram_mapper,
200	                                              balance_block_type_utilization,
201	                                              attraction_groups,
202	                                              num_used_type_instances,
203	                                              mutable_device_ctx);
204	        }
205	
206	        // Ensure that the seed was packed successfully.
207	        VTR_ASSERT(new_cluster_id.is_valid());
208	        VTR_ASSERT(cluster_legalizer.is_mol_clustered(seed_mol_id));
209	
210	        // Update the clustering progress stats.
211	        size_t num_molecules_in_cluster = cluster_legalizer.get_num_molecules_in_cluster(new_cluster_id);
212	        clustering_stats.num_molecules_processed += num_molecules_in_cluster;
213	        clustering_stats.mols_since_last_print += num_molecules_in_cluster;
214	
215	        // Print the current progress of the packing after a cluster has been
216	        // successfully created.
217	        print_pack_status(clustering_stats.num_molecules,
218	                          clustering_stats.num_molecules_processed,
219	                          clustering_stats.mols_since_last_print,
220	                          mutable_device_ctx.grid.width(),
221	                          mutable_device_ctx.grid.height(),
222	                          attraction_groups,
223	                          cluster_legalizer);
224	
225	        // Pick new seed.
226	        seed_mol_id = seed_selector.get_next_seed(cluster_legalizer);
227	    }

230	    report_le_physical_block_usage(cluster_legalizer);
231	
232	    return num_used_type_instances;
233	}
234	
235	LegalizationClusterId GreedyClusterer::try_grow_cluster(PackMoleculeId seed_mol_id,
236	                                                        GreedyCandidateSelector& candidate_selector,
237	                                                        ClusterLegalizationStrategy strategy,
238	                                                        ClusterLegalizer& cluster_legalizer,
239	                                                        const Prepacker& prepacker,
240	                                                        const RamMapper& ram_mapper,
241	                                                        bool balance_block_type_utilization,
242	                                                        AttractionInfo& attraction_groups,
243	                                                        std::map<t_logical_block_type_ptr, size_t>& num_used_type_instances,
244	                                                        DeviceContext& mutable_device_ctx) {
245	
246	    // Check to ensure that this molecule is unclustered.
247	    VTR_ASSERT(!cluster_legalizer.is_mol_clustered(seed_mol_id));
248	
249	    // Set the legalization strategy of the cluster legalizer.
250	    cluster_legalizer.set_legalization_strategy(strategy);
251	
252	    // Use the seed to start a new cluster.
253	    LegalizationClusterId legalization_cluster_id = start_new_cluster(seed_mol_id,
254	                                                                      cluster_legalizer,
255	                                                                      prepacker,
256	                                                                      ram_mapper,
257	                                                                      balance_block_type_utilization,
258	                                                                      num_used_type_instances,
259	                                                                      mutable_device_ctx);
260	
261	    // Create the cluster gain stats. This updates the gains in the candidate
262	    // selector due to a new molecule being clustered.
263	    ClusterGainStats cluster_gain_stats = candidate_selector.create_cluster_gain_stats(seed_mol_id,
264	                                                                                       legalization_cluster_id,
265	                                                                                       cluster_legalizer,
266	                                                                                       attraction_groups);
267	
268	    // Select the first candidate molecule to try to add to this cluster.
269	    PackMoleculeId candidate_mol_id = candidate_selector.get_next_candidate_for_cluster(
270	        cluster_gain_stats,
271	        legalization_cluster_id,
272	        cluster_legalizer,
273	        attraction_groups);
274	
275	    /*
276	     * When attraction groups are created, the purpose is to pack more densely by adding more molecules
277	     * from the cluster's attraction group to the cluster. In a normal flow, (when attraction groups are
278	     * not on), the cluster keeps being packed until the get_molecule routines return either a repeated
279	     * molecule or a nullptr. When attraction groups are on, we want to keep exploring molecules for the
280	     * cluster until a nullptr is returned. So, the number of repeated molecules allowed is increased to a
281	     * large value.
282	     */
283	    int max_num_repeated_molecules = 1;
284	    if (attraction_groups.num_attraction_groups() > 0)
285	        max_num_repeated_molecules = attraction_groups_max_repeated_molecules_;
286	
287	    // Continuously try to cluster candidate molecules into the cluster
288	    // until one of the following occurs:
289	    //  1) No candidate molecule is proposed.
290	    //  2) The same candidate was proposed multiple times.
291	    int num_repeated_molecules = 0;
292	    while (candidate_mol_id.is_valid() && num_repeated_molecules < max_num_repeated_molecules) {
293	        // Try to cluster the candidate molecule into the cluster.
294	        bool success = try_add_candidate_mol_to_cluster(candidate_mol_id,
295	                                                        legalization_cluster_id,
296	                                                        cluster_legalizer,
297	                                                        prepacker);
298	
299	        // If the candidate molecule was clustered successfully, update
300	        // the cluster stats.
301	        if (success) {
302	            // If the last candidate was clustered successfully, update the
303	            // gains in the candidate selector.
304	            candidate_selector.update_cluster_gain_stats_candidate_success(cluster_gain_stats,
305	                                                                           candidate_mol_id,
306	                                                                           legalization_cluster_id,
307	                                                                           cluster_legalizer,
308	                                                                           attraction_groups);
309	        } else {
310	            // If the last candidate was not clustered successfully, update the
311	            // gains in the candidate selector accordingly.
312	            candidate_selector.update_cluster_gain_stats_candidate_failed(cluster_gain_stats,
313	                                                                          candidate_mol_id);
314	        }
315	
316	        // Get the next candidate molecule.
317	        PackMoleculeId prev_candidate_mol_id = candidate_mol_id;
318	        candidate_mol_id = candidate_selector.get_next_candidate_for_cluster(
319	            cluster_gain_stats,
320	            legalization_cluster_id,
321	            cluster_legalizer,
322	            attraction_groups);
323	
324	        // If the next candidate molecule is the same as the previous
325	        // candidate molecule, increment the number of repeated
326	        // molecules counter.
327	        if (candidate_mol_id == prev_candidate_mol_id)
328	            num_repeated_molecules++;
329	    }
330	
331	    // Ensure that the cluster has a legal final routing.
332	    //
333	    // If strategy == SKIP_INTRA_LB_ROUTE, then this is the first and only
334	    // legality check.
335	    //
336	    // If strategy == FULL, then it is possible to reach this step without a
337	    // routing solution if a cluster has been packed the same way before, due
338	    // to skipping routing on clusters that are known to be legal from the
339	    // PackingSignatureTree. In this case, routing must be run at least once on
340	    // the final cluster for later stages to use.
341	    if (!cluster_legalizer.ensure_legal_final_routing(legalization_cluster_id)) {
342	        // If the cluster is not legal, undo the cluster.
343	        // Update the used type instances.
344	        num_used_type_instances[cluster_legalizer.get_cluster_type(legalization_cluster_id)]--;
345	        // Destroy the illegal cluster.
346	        cluster_legalizer.destroy_cluster(legalization_cluster_id);
347	        cluster_legalizer.compress();
348	        // Cluster failed to grow.
349	        return LegalizationClusterId();
350	    }
351	
352	    // A legal cluster must have been created by this point.
353	    VTR_ASSERT(legalization_cluster_id.is_valid());
354	
355	    // After the cluster has been fully created, update internal structures
356	    // to improve the gain calculation.
357	    candidate_selector.update_candidate_selector_finalize_cluster(cluster_gain_stats,
358	                                                                  legalization_cluster_id);
359

The前置摘要 gives me good context on what's already been covered - the greedy clusterer's do_clustering main loop, the two-stage legalization (SKIP_INTRA_LB_ROUTE then FULL), GreedyCandidateSelector, AttractionInfo, APPack. For module 4.1 (簇内布线图):
- 概念: What is the intra-cluster routing graph? It's a per-logical-block-type directed graph that models all the connectable pins and interconnect inside a cluster (CLB). It's the substrate the intra-cluster router runs pathfinder on. It's distinct from the device-level RR Graph (u6-l1).
- Why: A cluster is not just a bag of atoms - the atoms must be wired together through the architecture's `<interconnect>` (muxes, direct, complete). Whether a set of atoms can legally coexist depends on whether their nets can be routed through this internal interconnect. So we need a graph abstraction of it.
- Structure: t_lb_type_rr_node. Node types LB_SOURCE/LB_SINK/LB_INTERMEDIATE. Each pb_graph_pin → one node (indexed by pin_count_in_cluster). Plus 3 special nodes: ext source (total_pb_pins), ext sink (total_pb_pins+1), ext rr/feedback (total_pb_pins+2). Primitive input pins drive sinks; primitive output pins are sources; internal interconnect pins are intermediate with mode-dependent outedges.
- Mode-dependent edges: outedges[imode][iedge] because a pb_graph_pin's downstream connections depend on which mode its parent is in.
- Construction entry: alloc_and_load_all_lb_type_rr_graph, called once in setup_vpr.cpp:348 after pb graphs built. Stored per type.

For module 4.2 (合法化流程):

- LegalizationCluster: holds molecules, pb tree, type, PartitionRegion, noc_grp_id, a ClusterRouter, placement_stats.
- Two strategies FULL vs SKIP_INTRA_LB_ROUTE.
- try_pack_molecule pipeline (the heart): chain check → floorplanning → noc group → candidate primitive queue → place atoms → pin feasibility filter → detailed routing (if FULL) → commit/rollback.
- The candidate primitive while-loop: tries different root primitives until one works or exhausts.
- check_cluster_legality: always routes regardless of strategy.
- ensure_legal_final_routing: the final gate, with is_saved_route_valid fast path.

For module 4.3 (可行性过滤与失败回退):

  - Cluster-level (GreedyClusterer): two-stage retry; if ensure_legal_final_routing fails → destroy_cluster + compress.
  - Router-level: save_and_reset_lb_route_ keeps last good route; is_saved_route_valid / hot-start reuse.

input.content:
# 聚簇合法化与簇内布线

## 1. 本讲目标

上一讲（u4-l3）我们看到 `GreedyClusterer` 的 `do_clustering` 主循环如何用种子选择器与候选选择器，把分子一个一个往簇里塞。但「塞进去」并不等于「合法」——一个簇（CLB）并不是一口可以随意装原语的口袋，原子之间必须能通过架构 `<interconnect>` 描述的内部连线真正连通，且不超出引脚、面积、布局、NoC 分组等约束。

本讲聚焦这一道「门禁」：**聚簇合法化（cluster legalization）与簇内布线（intra-cluster routing）**。读完本讲，你应当能够：

1. 说清簇内布线图 `lb_type_rr_graph` 是什么、它和器件级 RR Graph（u6-l1）有何不同、它是如何由 PB 图构造出来的。
2. 描述 `ClusterLegalizer::try_pack_molecule` 这条由便宜到昂贵的合法化流水线，以及 `FULL` / `SKIP_INTRA_LB_ROUTE` 两种策略的差别。
3. 理解三层「可行性过滤」：快速兼容性检查、引脚可行性过滤、簇内 Pathfinder 布线，以及合法化失败时分子级与簇级的回退路径。

## 2. 前置知识

在进入源码前，先建立三个直觉。

**第一，为什么打包需要「布线」？** 打包把若干原子原语（LUT、FF、进位链等）装进一个逻辑块。但逻辑块内部的连线资源是有限的：架构 XML 用 `<interconnect>`（`complete`、`direct`、`mux`）描述了块内引脚之间「谁能连到谁」。一组原子即便各自都有空位，也可能因为内部连线走不通而无法共处一簇。因此「装得下」≠「连得通」，必须做一次簇内布线来确认。

**第二，什么是 Pathfinder 协商式布线？** 这是 VPR 在器件级布线（u6）和簇内布线都采用的核心算法。简言之：先允许同一个布线资源被多个线网「争用」（产生拥塞），再通过逐轮抬高拥塞资源的代价（present cost + historical cost），逼迫线网改走别的路径，直到所有线网都无冲突或确认无解。本讲看到的是它在「簇内」这一小图上的实例。

**第三，关键术语速查：**

| 术语 | 含义 |
|------|------|
| 分子（molecule） | 打包的最小搬运单元，u4-l2 讲过，可含一个或多个原子 |
| `t_pb` / `t_pb_graph_node` | 物理块实例层 / 模板层，u4-l1 讲过 |
| `lb_type_rr_graph` | 本讲主角一：逻辑块**类型**内部的布线资源图 |
| `ClusterLegalizer` | 本讲主角二：判定分子能否进入簇的「门禁」类 |
| `ClusterRouter` | 本讲主角三：在 `lb_type_rr_graph` 上跑 Pathfinder 的簇内路由器 |

## 3. 本讲源码地图

| 文件 | 作用 |
|------|------|
| [vpr/src/pack/pack_types.h](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/pack_types.h) | 定义簇内布线图的节点结构 `t_lb_type_rr_node` 与节点类型枚举 `e_lb_rr_type` |
| [vpr/src/pack/lb_type_rr_graph.h](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/lb_type_rr_graph.h) / [.cpp](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/lb_type_rr_graph.cpp) | 簇内布线图的构造、释放与访问函数 |
| [vpr/src/pack/cluster_router.h](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_router.h) / [.cpp](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec62818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_router.cpp) | 簇内路由器 `ClusterRouter`，跑 Pathfinder 判定可布线性 |
| [vpr/src/pack/cluster_legalizer.h](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_legalizer.h) / [.cpp](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_legalizer.cpp) | 合法化管理器 `ClusterLegalizer`，串起所有合法性检查 |
| [vpr/src/pack/greedy_clusterer.cpp](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/greedy_clusterer.cpp) | 调用合法化器的上层（u4-l3），含两级回退 |
| [vpr/src/base/setup_vpr.cpp](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/base/setup_vpr.cpp) | 在 setup 阶段一次性建好所有类型的簇内布线图 |

---

## 4. 核心概念与源码讲解

### 4.1 簇内布线图 lb_type_rr_graph

#### 4.1.1 概念说明

簇内布线图（lb = logic block，rr = routing resource）是**针对每一种逻辑块类型**预先建好的一张有向图，刻画「这个类型的逻辑块内部，哪些引脚能通过内部互连连到哪些引脚」。它是 `ClusterRouter` 跑 Pathfinder 的「棋盘」。

务必把它和第 6 单元要讲的**器件级 RR Graph** 区分开：

| 维度 | 簇内布线图 `lb_type_rr_graph` | 器件级 RR Graph |
|------|------------------------------|------------------|
| 范围 | 单个逻辑块**类型**的内部 | 整颗 FPGA 芯片 |
| 节点 | 块内 `pb_graph_pin` + 几个虚拟源/汇 | 器件上所有线段、引脚、开关盒 |
| 用途 | 打包阶段判定一簇原子能否内部连通 | 布线阶段为整网表寻径 |
| 数量 | 每种逻辑块类型一张 | 全局一张 |
| 生命周期 | setup 建一次，打包全程复用 | 布线前按通道宽度建 |

一句话：器件级 RR Graph 管「块与块之间怎么走」，簇内布线图管「一个块内部怎么走」。本讲只谈后者。

#### 4.1.2 核心流程

簇内布线图的构造规则，源码注释写得非常清楚（值得逐字读）：

> 每个 `pb_graph_pin` 对应一个节点，按该 pin 的 `pin_count_in_cluster` 编号；
> 驱动进逻辑块的外部线网来自一个「外部源」，编号 = 总引脚数；
> 逻辑块驱动出去的外部线网汇到一个「外部汇」，编号 = 总引脚数 + 1；
> 每个原语输入引脚驱动一个汇节点，因输入引脚本身已有节点，故这些汇追加在向量末尾；
> 每个原语输出引脚是一个源。

节点类型只有三种（[pack_types.h:L20-L25](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/pack_types.h#L20-L25)）：`LB_SOURCE`（源，能驱动别人）、`LB_SINK`（汇，被驱动到此终止）、`LB_INTERMEDIATE`（中间节点，既被驱动也驱动别人）。一个簇内图大致长这样：

```
外部源 ──> 顶层输入/时钟引脚 ──> [内部互连 mux/direct] ──> 原语输入引脚 ──> 原语输入汇
                                     ^                         |
                                     |                         v
                                  (模式相关)              原语输出引脚(源)
                                     |                         |
顶层输出引针 <── [内部互连] <─────────┴─────────────────────────┘
   │
   └──> 外部汇   (块输出送出给别的块)
   └──> 外部 rr (反馈节点：把块输出绕回块输入，代价极高，尽量不用)
```

其中**「模式相关」（mode-dependent）** 是这张图最精巧的地方：一个引脚的下游连边取决于其父块当前处于哪个 `mode`（u4-l1 讲过 `t_pb_type → t_mode → t_pb_type` 的递归）。因此节点的出边不是一维数组，而是 `outedges[imode][iedge]`——按模式分桶。

整张图在 setup 阶段一次性建好，调用点是 [setup_vpr.cpp:L346-L348](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/base/setup_vpr.cpp#L346-L348)，紧跟在 PB 图构建之后。

#### 4.1.3 源码精读

**节点结构 `t_lb_type_rr_node`**（[pack_types.h:L57-L77](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/pack_types.h#L57-L77)）：

```cpp
struct t_lb_type_rr_node {
    short capacity;            // 该节点能同时被几个线网使用
    int num_modes;             // 模式数（决定 outedges 的第一维）
    short* num_fanout;         // [0..num_modes-1] 每个模式下的出边数
    enum e_lb_rr_type type;    // LB_SOURCE / LB_SINK / LB_INTERMEDIATE
    t_lb_type_rr_node_edge** outedges; // [mode][edge] 二维出边表
    t_pb_graph_pin* pb_graph_pin;      // 关联的 pb_graph_pin（虚拟节点为空）
    float intrinsic_cost;
};
```

每条出边只是一个目标节点索引加固有代价（[pack_types.h:L51-L54](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/pack_types.h#L51-L54)）：

```cpp
struct t_lb_type_rr_node_edge {
    int node_index;
    float intrinsic_cost;
};
```

`capacity` 是合法性的命脉：簇内布线成功与否，最终就看是否每个节点的占用数 `occ` 都 ≤ `capacity`（见 4.3.3）。

**构造入口**（[lb_type_rr_graph.cpp:L53-L70](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/lb_type_rr_graph.cpp#L53-L70)）：遍历 `device_ctx.logical_block_types`，对每个非空类型调用 `alloc_and_load_lb_type_rr_graph_for_type` 建一张图，结果存进按类型索引的数组。文件头部的长注释（[lb_type_rr_graph.cpp:L1-L18](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/lb_type_rr_graph.cpp#L1-L18)）即 4.1.2 的构造规则原文。

**三个特殊虚拟节点**（[lb_type_rr_graph.cpp:L181-L184](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/lb_type_rr_graph.cpp#L181-L184)）：外部源、外部汇、外部 rr（反馈）分别落在 `total_pb_pins`、`+1`、`+2`。注意外部 rr 连回块内输入引脚的代价被刻意设为 `1000`（[lb_type_rr_graph.cpp:L267](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/lb_type_rr_graph.cpp#L267)），注释写明「set cost high to avoid using external interconnect unless necessary」——即「能不把信号绕出块外就别绕」。

**原语输入引脚→汇**（[lb_type_rr_graph.cpp:L303-L340](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/lb_type_rr_graph.cpp#L303-L340)）：每个原语输入 pin 建一个 `LB_INTERMEDIATE` 节点，再追加一个 `LB_SINK`；若端口声明了引脚等价（`PortEquivalence`），则同端口的多个 pin 共享一个 capacity = 端口宽度的汇——这正是「等价引脚可互换」在图上的体现。

**对外访问函数**（[lb_type_rr_graph.h:L16-L18](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/lb_type_rr_graph.h#L16-L18)）：`get_lb_type_rr_graph_ext_source_index` / `ext_sink_index`（实现 [lb_type_rr_graph.cpp:L108-L115](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/lb_type_rr_graph.cpp#L108-L115)）给出虚拟源/汇的索引；`get_lb_type_rr_graph_edge_mode`（[L117-L127](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/lb_type_rr_graph.cpp#L117-L127)）反查两节点间的连边属于哪个模式。

#### 4.1.4 代码实践

**目标**：亲眼看到一张簇内布线图长什么样。

**步骤**：

1. 打开 [lb_type_rr_graph.cpp:L641-L674](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/lb_type_rr_graph.cpp#L641-L674) 的 `print_lb_type_rr_graph`，读懂它打印的格式：节点号、关联的 `pb_graph_node[port][pin]`、类型、容量、每个模式的出边 `(目标, 代价)`。
2. 找到 `echo_lb_type_rr_graphs`（[lb_type_rr_graph.cpp:L134-L150](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/lb_type_rr_graph.cpp#L134-L150)），它把所有类型的图写入一个文件。
3. 在 `vpr` 源码里搜索 `echo_lb_type_rr_graphs` 的调用处（grep 整个仓库），看它是被哪个 echo 开关触发的。

**需要观察的现象**：在打印结果中，前 `total_pb_pins` 个节点一一对应 `pb_graph_pin`；编号 `total_pb_pins` / `+1` / `+2` 是三个虚拟节点；末尾追加的是各原语输入/时钟引脚的汇节点。某个原语输出 pin 的 `outedges` 会按模式分成多组。

**预期结果**：你能指着打印输出说出「这条边属于 mode X，代价是 Y」。

> 说明：本实践为源码阅读型，是否能在某次运行中产出该 echo 文件取决于具体的 echo 命令行开关，**待本地验证**触发方式。

#### 4.1.5 小练习与答案

**练习 1**：簇内布线图的节点编号 0..N-1 是按什么分配的？为什么虚拟源/汇要排在所有真实引脚之后？

**答案**：真实引脚节点按 `pb_graph_pin::pin_count_in_cluster` 编号（u4-l1 讲过的簇内扁平索引），保证「引脚 ↔ 节点」一一对应、O(1) 互查；虚拟源/汇/反馈不对应任何具体引脚，故追加在 `total_pb_pins` 之后，避免占用引脚编号空间。

**练习 2**：为什么原语输出引脚的 `outedges` 是 `outedges[imode][iedge]` 二维的，而原语输入引脚的出边却只有一维？

**答案**：原语输出连向的内部互连（`mux`/`complete`/`direct`）属于其**父块的某个 mode**，父块处于不同 mode 时下游拓扑不同，故按模式分桶；原语输入引脚只连到自己的汇节点，与模式无关，故单一出边即可（见 [lb_type_rr_graph.cpp:L313-L339](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/lb_type_rr_graph.cpp#L313-L339)）。

### 4.2 聚簇合法化流程

#### 4.2.1 概念说明

`ClusterLegalizer`（[cluster_legalizer.h:L223](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_legalizer.h#L223)）是聚簇阶段的「门禁」。它自己内部维护一族 `LegalizationCluster`，对外提供 `start_new_cluster` / `add_mol_to_cluster` / `check_cluster_legality` / `destroy_cluster` 等接口。它的设计目标是**自包含**——注释明确写到「able to be called externally to the Packer」，即可以脱离 `GreedyClusterer` 单独使用。

合法化的本质是一条**由便宜到昂贵的检查流水线**：先用几乎免费的检查（有没有空原语、布局约束、NoC 分组）筛掉明显不行的分子，再用稍贵的引脚可行性过滤，最后才动用最贵的簇内 Pathfinder 布线。这样能把昂贵的布线检查降到最少。

合法化器支持两种策略（[cluster_legalizer.h:L68-L71](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_legalizer.h#L68-L71)）：

- `SKIP_INTRA_LB_ROUTE`：每次加分子**不做**簇内布线，只在最后统一做一次。便宜但可能把「其实走不通」的分子也塞进去，直到终检才暴露。
- `FULL`：每加一个分子就跑一次完整簇内布线。昂贵但保证簇在建过程中始终合法。

#### 4.2.2 核心流程

合法化的核心是 `try_pack_molecule`（[cluster_legalizer.cpp:L1206](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_legalizer.cpp#L1206)），它对单个分子执行如下流水线：

```
try_pack_molecule(molecule, cluster)
  │
  ├─ 1. 长链冲突检查：本簇已有长链 & 该分子也是长链 → FAIL_FEASIBLE
  ├─ 2. 布局约束检查：逐原子与簇 PartitionRegion 求交 → FAIL_FLOORPLANNING
  ├─ 3. NoC 分组检查：逐原子 NoC 组一致性 → FAIL_NOC_GROUP
  │
  ├─ 4. 构造候选原语优先队列 primitives_alive
  └─ while (未 PASS 且队列非空):           ← 换不同根原语重试
        ├─ 弹出一个候选根原语 root
        ├─ 5. 逐原子 try_place_atom_block_rec：把分子各原子落到 PB 树空位
        ├─ 6. [若都放下] 引脚可行性过滤 check_lookahead_pins_used
        │      └─ 失败 → FAIL_FEASIBLE，换下一个 root
        ├─ 7. [若策略=FULL] 簇内布线 try_intra_lb_route (循环到无模式冲突)
        │      └─ 不可布 → FAIL_ROUTE，换下一个 root
        └─ 8. 全过 → 提交(commit)；否则 → 回退(rollback) 见 4.3
```

注意第 4 步那个 `while` 循环：分子可能因为选错了根原语位置而失败，合法化器会**换一个候选根原语再试**，直到成功或候选耗尽。`start_new_cluster`（[L1572](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_legalizer.cpp#L1572)）与 `add_mol_to_cluster`（[L1633](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_legalizer.cpp#L1633)）都只是 `try_pack_molecule` 的薄包装。

#### 4.2.3 源码精读

**簇的载体 `LegalizationCluster`**（[cluster_legalizer.h:L88-L157](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_legalizer.h#L88-L157)）：一个簇持有 `molecules`（已合法装入的分子表）、`pb`（块内物理块层次根）、`type`（逻辑块类型）、`pr`（合法布局区域 PartitionRegion）、`noc_grp_id`（NoC 分组）、`cluster_router`（本簇专属的簇内路由器）、`placement_stats`（原子当前落位统计）。注意 `cluster_router` 是**每簇一个**——这样每簇保留各自的布线状态，便于增量重布线与回退。

**长链冲突检查**（[cluster_legalizer.cpp:L1249-L1253](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_legalizer.cpp#L1249-L1253)）：若簇里已有一条长链（`has_long_chain`）且当前分子也属长链，直接 `BLK_FAILED_FEASIBLE`。注释解释：避免产生布局约束不兼容或过长的布局宏，损害布局灵活性。

**候选根原语 while 循环**（[cluster_legalizer.cpp:L1309-L1345](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_legalizer.cpp#L1309-L1345)）：从优先队列 `primitives_alive` 弹出一个根原语，对分子里每个原子调 `try_place_atom_block_rec` 尝试落位；任一原子落位失败就记下 `failed_location` 并换下一个根。

**详细布线分派**（[cluster_legalizer.cpp:L1429-L1455](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_legalizer.cpp#L1429-L1455)）：只有策略为 `FULL` 时才跑簇内布线。代码用 `do { reset; routed = try_intra_lb_route(...); } while (mode_status.is_mode_issue());` 反复重布，直到没有模式冲突；并据 `PackingSignatureTree`（合法化记忆树，可选）跳过已知合法/非法的模式。布线失败置 `BLK_FAILED_ROUTE`。

**最终合法性闸门**：`check_cluster_legality`（[cluster_legalizer.cpp:L1746-L1759](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_legalizer.cpp#L1746-L1759)）**无视当前策略**，强制跑一次簇内布线来下最终结论。`ensure_legal_final_routing`（[L1761-L1786](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_legalizer.cpp#L1761-L1786)）是它的带快进版本：先用 `is_saved_route_valid()` 判断「上次的合法布线是否仍覆盖当前所有线网」，若覆盖则直接返回真，省掉重布线。

#### 4.2.4 代码实践

**目标**：跟踪一个分子从「候选」到「合法装入」或「被拒」的全过程。

**步骤**：

1. 打开 [cluster_router.h:L222-L244](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_router.h#L222-L244) 的 `ClusterRouter` 用法示例注释——它给出了一条标准的「构造→add_atom_as_target→try_intra_lb_route→alloc_and_load_pb_route→clean」使用链。
2. 在 `try_pack_molecule` 里对照 [cluster_legalizer.cpp:L1309](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_legalizer.cpp#L1309) 的 while 循环，回答：当 `try_place_atom_block_rec` 失败后，代码会做哪些清理才进入下一次循环尝试？

**需要观察的现象**：失败分支（见 4.3.3）会先把已经塞进 `cluster.molecules` 的分子 `pop_back`，再对已落位的原子调 `remove_atom_from_target` 和 `revert_place_atom_block`，然后 `cleanup_pb`、把失败原语挪进 tried 集合，最后回到 while 顶部换一个根原语重试。

**预期结果**：你能画出「分子被拒 → 清理现场 → 换根重试 → 重试耗尽返回失败状态」的状态转换。

#### 4.2.5 小练习与答案

**练习 1**：`start_new_cluster` 在尝试装第一个种子分子时，用的外部引脚利用率上限是什么？为什么？

**答案**：用 `FULL_EXTERNAL_PIN_UTIL(1., 1.)`（[cluster_legalizer.cpp:L1601-L1606](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_legalizer.cpp#L1601-L1606)），即允许使用全部簇引脚。因为种子是簇里的第一个分子，此刻没有任何理由限制引脚使用，应当让它尽可能装下。

**练习 2**：`SKIP_INTRA_LB_ROUTE` 策略下，分子加进去时不会跑布线，那簇的合法性最终由谁保证？

**答案**：由上层在加完所有分子后调用 `ensure_legal_final_routing`（即 `check_cluster_legality`）做一次总检来保证；若总检失败，上层会销毁整个簇（见 4.3.4）。

---

### 4.3 可行性过滤与失败回退

#### 4.3.1 概念说明

合法化流水线里，除了最后的簇内布线，前面每一站都是「可行性过滤」——用远低于布线的代价尽早剔除注定不行的分子。失败处理则分两层：**分子级回退**（分子在某个簇里装不下，清理现场、换根或换簇重试）与**簇级回退**（整个簇最终建不出来，销毁重建）。

失败原因被规整成一个枚举 `e_block_pack_status`（[cluster_legalizer.h:L74-L81](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_legalizer.h#L74-L81)）：

| 状态 | 含义 |
|------|------|
| `BLK_PASSED` | 通过全部检查 |
| `BLK_FAILED_FEASIBLE` | 快速可行性不过（无空原语、引脚不足、长链冲突） |
| `BLK_FAILED_ROUTE` | 簇内布线走不通 |
| `BLK_FAILED_FLOORPLANNING` | 与簇当前布局区域不兼容 |
| `BLK_FAILED_NOC_GROUP` | NoC 分组冲突 |

这套分类让上层能据此决定回退策略。

#### 4.3.2 核心流程：三层可行性过滤

```
[第 0 层] is_molecule_compatible          必要不充分：每原子有空原语？  O(快)
            │ 不过 → 上层根本不把它列为候选
            ▼
[第 1 层] try_pack_molecule 内的静态检查    长链 / 布局 / NoC / 引脚可行性过滤
            │ 不过 → BLK_FAILED_FEASIBLE / FLOORPLANNING / NOC
            ▼
[第 2 层] try_intra_lb_route (Pathfinder)  簇内布线，定论性  O(贵)
            │ 不过 → BLK_FAILED_ROUTE
            ▼
        BLK_PASSED
```

**第 0 层**是最便宜的「必要不充分」检查。注释原话（[cluster_legalizer.h:L478-L480](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_legalizer.h#L478-L480)）：「This is a necessary but not sufficient test ... you can save runtime for impossible cases vs. calling the full checks.」

**引脚可行性过滤**（第 1 层里的重头戏）：开启 `enable_pin_feasibility_filter_` 时，分子被临时加入后，调 `try_update_lookahead_pins_used` 统计簇内各类互相连通引脚的剩余量，再用 `check_lookahead_pins_used` 比对外部引脚利用率上限 `max_external_pin_util`（[cluster_legalizer.cpp:L1354-L1365](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_legalizer.cpp#L1354-L1365)）。它用「前瞻」估计未来引脚需求，能在不跑布线的前提下淘汰引脚不够的分子，是性能关键。

#### 4.3.3 核心流程：簇内 Pathfinder 布线

`ClusterRouter::try_intra_lb_route`（[cluster_router.cpp:L444](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_router.cpp#L444)）是协商式布线的簇内版。每条簇内线网 `t_intra_lb_net`（[cluster_router.h:L67-L87](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_router.h#L67-L87)）有若干终端（0 号是源，其余是汇）。算法主循环：

```
for iter in 0..max_iterations:
    pres_con_fac *= pres_fac_mult            # 逐轮抬高现时拥塞代价
    for each net inet:
        从源开始，对每个汇用优先队列做 maze 搜索 (try_expand_nodes_)
        把搜到的路径加回路由树 (add_to_rt_)
    if 无「不可能」标记:
        if is_route_success_(): 成功           # 所有节点 occ <= capacity
成功 → save_and_reset_lb_route_() 保存解
```

每个节点维护一份统计 `t_lb_rr_node_stats`（[cluster_router.h:L30-L45](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_router.h#L30-L45)）：`occ`（当前占用）、`mode`（所处模式）、`historical_usage`（历史占用，用于 hist_cost）。成功的判据极简——没有任何节点超容（[cluster_router.cpp:L1256-L1266](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_router.cpp#L1256-L1266)）：

```cpp
bool ClusterRouter::is_route_success_() {
    for (size_t inode = 0; inode < lb_type_graph.size(); inode++)
        if (lb_rr_node_stats_[inode].occ > lb_type_graph[inode].capacity)
            return false;     // 有节点被多个线网争用 → 仍拥塞
    return true;
}
```

为防死循环，迭代次数受 `params_.max_iterations` 上限约束；模式冲突（`mode_status.is_mode_issue()`）时扩大搜索到「所有模式」重试（[cluster_router.cpp:L499-L503](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_router.cpp#L499-L503)）。

#### 4.3.4 核心流程：两层回退

**分子级回退**——`try_pack_molecule` 失败分支（[cluster_legalizer.cpp:L1526-L1558](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_legalizer.cpp#L1526-L1558)）做了完整的现场清理：

1. `cluster.molecules.pop_back()`——把临时塞进去的分子移除；
2. 对已落位原子调 `cluster_router.remove_atom_from_target`——从路由器目标集移除；
3. 对已落位原子调 `revert_place_atom_block`——回退 PB 树占位；
4. `reset_molecule_info`——清除分子链信息；
5. （若启用 PST）`rollback_to_checkpoint`——回退合法化记忆树游标；
6. `cleanup_pb`——释放未用的 pb 并重置模式；
7. `move_inflight_to_tried`——把失败的原语标记为「试过」。

随后回到 while 顶部换一个根原语重试；若候选耗尽，`try_pack_molecule` 返回失败状态给上层。

**簇级回退**——`GreedyClusterer` 的两级策略（[greedy_clusterer.cpp:L179-L204](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/greedy_clusterer.cpp#L179-L204)）：先用便宜的 `SKIP_INTRA_LB_ROUTE` 长一遍簇；若最终 `ensure_legal_final_routing` 不过（[L341-L350](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/greedy_clusterer.cpp#L341-L350)），就 `destroy_cluster` + `compress` 销毁，再用 `FULL` 策略重新长一遍。这呼应 u4-l3 讲过的「先快后慢」合法化。

**路由器级回退**——`ClusterRouter` 内部用 `saved_lb_nets_` 保存上一次成功解（`save_and_reset_lb_route_`），并通过 `is_saved_route_valid`（[cluster_router.cpp:L161](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_router.cpp#L161)）与「热启动」（`enable_hot_start_`）在重布线时复用未变线网的路由树，避免重复劳动。

#### 4.3.5 源码精读：第 0 层快速检查

`is_molecule_compatible`（[cluster_legalizer.cpp:L1950-L1982](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_legalizer.cpp#L1950-L1982)）逐原子调用 `exists_free_primitive_for_atom_block`，只要有一个原子找不到空原语就返回假。注释坦承它是「fast but not robust」——只查单原子，不保证整个分子放得下，因此是「必要不充分」。

#### 4.3.6 代码实践

**目标**：让合法化失败真实地「被看见」。

**步骤**：

1. 阅读 [cluster_legalizer.cpp:L1232-L1242](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_legalizer.cpp#L1232-L1242) 与 [L1244-L1253](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_legalizer.cpp#L1244-L1253) 的日志输出，注意 `VTR_LOGV(log_verbosity_ > 2, ... "FAILED pack molecule reason: ...")` 这一类语句——它们用 `log_verbosity_` 控制是否打印。
2. 找到合法化器构造函数里 `log_verbosity_` 的来源（[cluster_legalizer.cpp:L1827](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_legalizer.cpp#L1827)），再往上追到 `read_options`，确认提升它对应的命令行参数。
3. （可选运行）把该 verbosity 调高，跑一个 `--pack` 任务，在日志里 grep `FAILED pack molecule reason`，统计各类失败原因的出现次数。

**需要观察的现象**：日志会逐分子打印失败原因（`floorplanning_conflict`、`noc_group_conflict`、`long_chain_conflict`、`Pin Feasibility Filter`、`Detailed Routing Legality` 等），对应 `e_block_pack_status` 的各个取值。

**预期结果**：你能把日志里某条 `FAILED` 与本讲流水线的某一站精确对上号。命令行的确切参数名**待本地验证**。

#### 4.3.7 小练习与答案

**练习 1**：`is_route_success_` 只检查 `occ <= capacity`，那「所有线网都连上了汇」这件事由谁保证？

**答案**：由主循环里 `try_expand_nodes_` 的返回值 `is_impossible` 保证——若某个汇在扩展过程中始终搜不到，会置 `is_impossible`，循环提前判定本次布线失败（[cluster_router.cpp:L497-L503](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_router.cpp#L497-L503)）。`is_route_success_` 只在「没有不可达汇」的前提下，再确认没有拥塞。

**练习 2**：分子级回退里，为什么要先 `remove_atom_from_target` 再 `revert_place_atom_block`，顺序不能反？

**答案**：`remove_atom_from_target` 先把原子从路由器的目标线网集里摘掉，使后续布线不再考虑它；`revert_place_atom_block` 再回收 PB 树里的物理占位。若反过来先回收占位，路由器里仍残留指向已被释放 pb 的目标引用，会读到悬空状态——先摘目标、再回收占位是安全的依赖顺序。

---

## 5. 综合实践

把本讲三块知识串起来，完成一次「簇内布线图 → 合法化 → 失败回退」的端到端跟踪。

**任务**：假设你要回答「为什么某个分子没能和某个种子装进同一个 CLB？」请按下面顺序取证：

1. **图结构侧**：用 4.1.4 的方法导出该 CLB 类型的簇内布线图，找到种子原子输出引脚对应的 `LB_SOURCE` 节点，以及候选分子输入引脚对应的 `LB_SINK` 节点，人工判断它们之间是否存在**模式相关**的连通路径。
2. **合法化侧**：在 `try_pack_molecule` 里设断点或在 [cluster_legalizer.cpp:L1354-L1365](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_legalizer.cpp#L1354-L1365)（引脚过滤）与 [L1429-L1455](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_legalizer.cpp#L1429-L1455)（详细布线）附近加临时日志，确认分子究竟死在哪一站、返回哪个 `e_block_pack_status`。
3. **回退侧**：跟踪失败后 [cluster_legalizer.cpp:L1526-L1558](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/cluster_legalizer.cpp#L1526-L1558) 的清理是否完整执行，以及上层 `GreedyClusterer` 是否触发了 `FULL` 策略重试（[greedy_clusterer.cpp:L194-L204](https://github.com/verilog-to-routing/vtr-verilog-to-routing/blob/c3ad1ec64818c9db312e24967de9d6283410ab19/vpr/src/pack/greedy_clusterer.cpp#L194-L204)）。

**交付**：一张包含「失败站点 → 状态码 → 触发的回退动作」三列的表格，并用一句话给出该分子被拒的根本原因（例如「两个原子需经 mode 1 的 mux 连通，但簇已固定在 mode 0」）。

> 注意：本实践涉及加日志或断点调试，需自行构建 VPR（参考 u1-l2 的 `make -j8 vpr`）。若仅做静态阅读，至少应能凭源码推理填写出表格前两列。

## 6. 本讲小结

- **簇内布线图 `lb_type_rr_graph`** 是每种逻辑块类型内部连线的有向图，节点为 `pb_graph_pin` 加三个虚拟源/汇/反馈节点，节点类型仅 `LB_SOURCE` / `LB_SINK` / `LB_INTERMEDIATE`，出边按父块**模式**分桶（`outedges[imode]`），在 setup 阶段一次性建好。
- **`ClusterLegalizer`** 是自包含的「门禁」，用 `try_pack_molecule` 跑一条由便宜到贵的检查流水线：长链/布局/NoC 静态检查 → 引脚可行性过滤 → 簇内 Pathfinder 布线；支持 `SKIP_INTRA_LB_ROUTE`（先塞后检）与 `FULL`（边塞边检）两种策略。
- **三层可行性过滤**层层省钱：`is_molecule_compatible`（必要不充分的空原语检查）→ 静态约束与引脚可行性过滤 → 定论性的簇内布线；失败原因被 `e_block_pack_status` 枚举归一。
- **簇内布线**用协商式 Pathfinder：逐轮抬高拥塞代价直到所有节点 `occ ≤ capacity`（`is_route_success_`），受 `max_iterations` 与模式冲突重试约束，成功解存入 `saved_lb_nets_` 供回退/热启动复用。
- **失败回退分两级**：分子级（`pop_back` + `remove_atom_from_target` + `revert_place_atom_block` + PST 回滚 + `cleanup_pb`，然后换根原语重试）；簇级（`GreedyClusterer` 先 `SKIP` 后 `FULL`，仍不过则 `destroy_cluster` + `compress`）。

## 7. 下一步学习建议

本讲结束，「打包 Packing」单元（u4）的四个最小模块——总览与 PB 图、分子、贪心聚簇器、合法化与簇内布线——已全部讲完，你已具备从 `AtomNetlist` 到 `ClusteredNetlist` 的完整打包视角。接下来建议：

1. **横向对照布线算法**：进入第 6 单元（u6-l2 连接路由器、u6-l3 连接级布线），把本讲的**簇内 Pathfinder** 与器件级 Pathfinder 对比阅读——同样是协商式拥塞，但器件级面对的是 `rr_graph_view` 与通道宽度，规模与前瞻机制（router lookahead）都更复杂。
2. **纵向追产物**：合法化成功后，`ClusterRouter::alloc_and_load_pb_route` 产出 `t_pb_route`，它被写入 `ClusteredNetlist` 的 `t_pb`（u3-l3）。可顺这条线阅读 `clustered_netlist.h`，看簇内布线结果如何成为布局阶段的输入。
3. **回看合法化记忆树**：本讲多次提到可选的 `PackingSignatureTree`（合法化记忆树）。若你对「如何用记忆避免重复布线检查」感兴趣，可阅读 `packing_signature_tree.h`，它是本讲流水线的一项重要运行时优化。
